title: Salin Glek

{{Quote|Greetings, I am Lieutenant Salin Glek, aide to Commander Ackbar. I trust you have a prime reason for jeopardizing the security of the base.|Salin Glek to an Alliance team|<ref name="SFS" />}}
'''Salin Glek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] who grew up in the bowels of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. One of [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar's]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenants]]; he was working on the [[Shantipole Project]], until Glek betrayed the [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] to [[Bane Nothos]]. He stole the ''[[Out Runner]]'' to make his escape.

==Biography==
Salin Glek was a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] who grew up in the underworld of a [[floating city]]. He despised his [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamarian]] neighbors, but never made his hatred known. He joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], climbing the ranks until he attained the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] and a position of power as [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar's]] chief aide on the [[Shantipole Project]] in the [[Roche asteroid field]]. He operated as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and intended to use the use the Empire to make the Mon Calamari suffer for their perceived crimes against the Quarren. His Imperial contact was [[District Commander]] [[Bane Nothos]], and Glek kept him advised of the progress of the new [[B-wing/E starfighter|two-man B-wing starfighter]] being developed at [[Research Station Shantipole]]. As the prototypes for the B-wing neared completion, Glek sent a message to Nothos, giving him time to form a strike [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] before sending a final signal to attack and claim the prototypes.<ref name="SFS" />

Glek learned from an [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] that the two B-wing prototypes were flight-capable, but the Quarren kept that information from Ackbar. Three [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after sending the signal, Glek met an Alliance team that arrived at the base carrying a priority [[Hologram disc/Legends|holodisc]] for Ackbar direct from [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]. Glek attempted to intercept the disc, but the team had orders to hand it directly to Ackbar himself. The team met with Ackbar, and the holodisc indicated that it was private for Ackbar and the Alliance team; Glek was dismissed from the room while the message from Mon Mothma was played, but chose instead to take the team's [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Out Runner]]'', and flee to Nothos' [[Bane Nothos' Nebulon-B escort frigate|command ship]]. He also gave the final attack command to Nothos, and incapacitated two [[asteroid hopper]]s on the way out.<ref name="SFS" />

During the Empire's [[Battle of Roche (Galactic Civil War)|assault]] on the Project, Glek landed the ''Out Runner'' on Research Station Shantipole and oversaw Imperial [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] loading the prototype [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] onto a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]]. He engaged the Alliance team in battle as they attempted to recover the prototypes.<ref name="SFS" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Pah, dreams are only useless illusions.|Salin Glek|<ref name="SFS" />}}
Glek was a bitter, hateful Quarren, despising the Mon Calamari, and Ackbar in particular. His motivations for the betrayal of the Alliance stemmed not from money, or power, but out of sheer spite. Glek hid is true feelings well, biding his time to betray the Alliance and Ackbar.<ref name="SFS" />

==Skills and abilities==
Glek was proficient in the use of a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], and could [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] a [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. He was also an effective liar and [[Con artist/Legends|con man]], and could bypass security systems.<ref name="SFS" /> As a Quarren, Glek was a strong swimmer, could breathe in both [[Oxygen/Legends|air]] and [[Water/Legends|water]], and was able to resist extreme pressures at ocean depths.<ref name="V5">''[[Strike Force: Shantipole]]''</ref> He could speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] and [[Quarrenese/Legends|Quarren]].<ref name="SFS" />

==Equipment==
During his time with the Shantipole project, Glek carried a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. He wore a brown tunic and [[Cape/Legends|cape]].<ref name="SFS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Strike Force: Shantipole]]'' {{Reprint|Strike Force: Shantipole}} {{1st}}
